positive: A stylized, highly contrasting graphic design featuring abstract celestial bodies and stylized mythological beasts interwoven into a symmetrical mandala pattern. The central subject is a majestic, winged celestial guardian surrounded by geometric constellations and flowing cosmic nebula elements. Use a color palette of deep indigo, vibrant cyan, electric violet, and crisp metallic gold accents. The style must be a blend of elegant Art Deco linework and cosmic geometric illustration, featuring bold, clean silhouettes and strong negative space. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for maximum impact on apparel, resembling a stylized tattoo flash sheet. Highly detailed, crisp vector-art quality, volumetric lighting, cinematic symmetry.
